prompts.text: 'Rhythm' — a pattern of sounds in time. 'Beat' — the steady pulse underneath, like a heartbeat. 'Timing' — pressing at exactly the right moment. Introduce all three before starting.
Clap or tap the beat together as notes approach — build the physical feel of the rhythm before the key press. The body knowing the beat is the foundation.
Core question: 'Can you feel when the note is about to arrive? What helps you know?' — makes the internal timing process conscious and discussable.
Extension: 'Can you clap just the beat — the steady pulse — while the music plays, without pressing any keys?' — isolates pulse from melody.
